characters.appearance: Female, 20s, slim build, fair complexion, long straight dark hair.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Siksth... यार? [Sixth... man?]
Character B says: Sixth. Supernova AI सुनो। [Sixth. Listen to Supernova AI.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the dynamic: one partner struggling with English pronunciation, the other helping.
- Introduces the Supernova AI tutor concept naturally.
- Sets a lighthearted, relatable tone for Indian learners.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Jwellery? [Jewellery?]
Character B says: Jewelry. देखो score. [Jewelry. Look at the score.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Continues the pronunciation practice with a commonly mispronounced word in India.
- Highlights the app's real-time scoring and feedback feature.
- Maintains the encouraging, non-judgmental vibe.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Thot... छोड़ यार, मुझसे नहीं होगा। [Thot... leave it man, I can't do it.]
Character B says: अरे try करो। Thoughtful. [Come on, try. Thoughtful.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Captures a moment of frustration that is highly relatable to learners.
- Character B acts as the supportive guide, mirroring Supernova's brand voice.
- Keeps the humor and emotional connection strong.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: The six sick sheep.
Character B says: The sixth sick sheep. Supernova पे रोज़ practice करो, हो जाएगा! [The sixth sick sheep. Practice daily on Supernova, you'll get it!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Ends with a fun, challenging tongue twister.
- Delivers the final call-to-action to practice daily on Supernova.
- Leaves the viewer with a positive, empowering message.
